Class DijkstraPathFinder

java.lang.Object
evacuation.routing.DijkstraPathFinder
All Implemented Interfaces:
PathFinder, Serializable
public class DijkstraPathFinder extends Object implements PathFinder, Serializable
Pathfinder implementation using Dijkstra's algorithm. Computes shortest weighted paths on the evacuation graph.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DijkstraPathFinder(Graph graph)
    Constructs a DijkstraPathFinder for the given graph.

    Returns the distance map from the last computed path.

    Returns the last computed shortest path.

    Invalidates cached computation, forcing recalculation on next call.

  • Constructor Details

    • DijkstraPathFinder

      public DijkstraPathFinder(Graph graph)
      Constructs a DijkstraPathFinder for the given graph.
      Parameters:
      graph - the evacuation graph to search

  • Method Details

    • findPath

      public List<Node> findPath(Node src, Node dest)
      Computes the shortest path from source to destination. Uses Dijkstra's algorithm with edge weights that account for speed modifiers.
      Specified by:
      findPath in interface PathFinder
      Parameters:
      src - the starting node
      dest - the target node
      Returns:
      ordered list of nodes from src to dest (inclusive), or empty list if no path

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Invalidates cached computation, forcing recalculation on next call.
      Specified by:
      reset in interface PathFinder

    • getLastPath

      public List<Node> getLastPath()
      Returns the last computed shortest path.
      Specified by:
      getLastPath in interface PathFinder
      Returns:
      last computed path, or empty list if none computed

    • getDistances

      public Map<String,Double> getDistances()
      Returns the distance map from the last computed path.
      Returns:
      map of node ID to distance from last source
